news_items.headline: Dodgers minors: Ryan Ward, Logan Wagner, Luis Carias
news_items.summary: Dodgers outfielders Josue De Paula and Mike Sirota covered all seven innings in left field for the National League in Sunday’s MLB Futures Game in Philadelphia. De Paula played the first four innings and singled once in his two at-bats. Sirota struck out in his only at-bat, but much like Eric Gagne’s blown save in […]

news_items.headline: Wetherholt has $20 million in escalators as part of $112.5 million, 8-year contract with Cardinals
news_items.summary: He gets salaries of $2.5 million next season, $4 million in 2028, $7.5 million in 2029, $12.5 million in 2030, $17 million in 2031, $20 million in 2032, $22 million in 2033 and $25 million in 2034.

Mariners prospects Kade Anderson and Ryan Sloan use friendly competition to push towards MLB debuts
news_items.summary: Eric Samulski talks to Kade Anderson and Ryan Sloan at the Futures Game about their relationship and fight for a rotation spot.

news_items.headline: Astros’ Brice Matthews leaves game against Rangers with left knee injury
news_items.summary: Houston Astros center fielder Brice Matthews left the game against Texas with a left knee injury after crashing back into the wall while pulling back a ball hit by Josh Jung.

news_items.headline: Happy Birthday Bill Caudill
news_items.summary: Bill Caudill celebrates his 70th birthday today. For those unfamiliar, Caudill was the Blue Jays’ answer to B.J. Ryan back in the 1980s. He broke into the majors with the Cubs, then found his stride as one of baseball’s elite closers in Seattle, before moving to Oakland, where he racked up 36 saves in a […]

news_items.headline: The Washington Nationals had a good first half but it could have been so much better
news_items.summary: The Nats had a very exciting first half but it could have been so much more if the bullpen was even an average unit

news_items.headline: Surging Red Sox cap first 9-0 road trip since '77
news_items.summary: The Red Sox completed a sweep of the Mets with a 3-2 victory on Sunday, marking their first 9-0 road trip since 1977.

news_items.headline: Orioles' Alexander hit by pitch, has fractured han...
news_items.summary: Orioles third baseman Blaze Alexander suffered a non-displaced fracture in his left hand after being hit by a pitch Sunday, manager Craig Albernaz said.

news_items.headline: Marlins pick Japanese slugger Sasaki in 8th round
news_items.summary: The Miami Marlins drafted Japanese slugger Rintaro Sasaki out of Stanford in the eighth round of the amateur draft on Sunday.

news_items.headline: Phils' Sanchez, Jays' Cease get ASG starting nods
news_items.summary: Fresh off defeating the Detroit Tigers on Saturday for his 11th victory, Cristopher Sanchez of the Philadelphia Phillies on Sunday learned that he will start Tuesday night's All-Star Game, taking the mound against Dylan Cease of the Toronto Blue Jays.

news_items.headline: McCarthy has 2nd inside-the-park HR this season
news_items.summary: The Giants overcame Jake McCarthy's second leadoff inside-the-park home run this season to beat the Rockies 3-1 Sunday.

news_items.headline: Yanks' sweep included 3 rallies from 8th inning-on...
news_items.summary: Ben Rice's two-run triple in the eighth inning Sunday afternoon helped the Yankees to a 5-3 victory over the Washington Nationals, allowing New York to complete a three-game sweep in which it rallied to win each contest in the eighth inning or later.
